label: List serial ports
description: Lists the COM/serial ports available on this machine.

label: Wait for boot pattern
description: Watches the serial console and passes when the boot-complete text appears.

label: Wait for login prompt
description: Watches the serial console and passes when a 'login:' prompt appears.

label: Monitor console → capture
description: Records the serial console for a set time and attaches the log to the report.

label: Send a command
description: Sends a line of text to the serial port (e.g. reboot).

label: Send a login username
description: Sends a username to the serial console at a login prompt.
